docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $445.40 FILED BY JMT LEASING INC. DBA THRIFTY CAR RENTAL AS TO DEFENDANT PROFESSIONAL PARKING SERVICE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PROFESSIONAL PARKING SERVICE INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JMT LEASING INC. DBA THRIFTY CAR RENTAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PROFESSIONAL PARKING SERVICE INC. $227.50 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $267.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY MARK LIU HEARING SET FOR AUG-07-1995 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT C
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF AUG-07-1995, OFF CALENDAR AS TO THIRD PARTY MARK LIU
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $17.84 ACCRUED INTEREST, $14.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT PROFESSIONAL PARKING SERVICE INC.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ORANGE COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PROFESSIONAL PARKING SERVICE INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ORANGE COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $308.02 AS TO DEFENDANT PROFESSIONAL PARKING SERVICE INC.
